entries.title: Settings page
entries.description: Account settings now available from the gear icon in the top-right nav. Shows your verified email address, subscription tier, and sign-out controls.

entries.title: FAQ & Contact pages
entries.description: Answers to common questions about the model, picks, and platform. Reach us at support@credencesports.com for anything not covered.

entries.title: Admin tab visibility now Cognito-group aware
entries.description: The Admin link in the sub-nav is now shown only to users assigned to the admin Cognito group — no more hardcoded email list.
